nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.label_negative: AI as unhelpful for concrete tasks
nodes.grounding_span: Brainstorming is the most successful exchange, generally speaking, because we can bounce back and forth on ideas

nodes.label: AI as confidence-building assistant
nodes.grounding_span: My self esteem regarding stranger and riskier ideas. LLMs have been great cheerleaders in that regard.

nodes.label: AI as threat to artistic endeavors
nodes.grounding_span: I worry about people automating their music so much that the artistic economy collapses

nodes.label: AI as guide of zeitgeist to be subverted
nodes.label_negative: AI as dominant paradigm without subversion
nodes.grounding_span: I suspect it'll soon guide the zeitgeist, and we'll get to subvert the paradigm.
